abort.no_usb_device_found: No Paperang P2 printer found via USB. Make sure the printer is connected and powered on.
abort.already_configured: This Paperang printer is already configured. To add another printer, connect a different one via USB.

error.communication_failed: Failed to communicate with the selected device. Check the connection and try again.
error.device_not_found: Selected device not found. It may have been disconnected.

user.title: Add Paperang P2 Printer
user.description: Connect your Paperang P2 via USB to auto-detect, or add manually.

select_device.title: Select USB Device
select_device.description: Multiple Paperang P2 printers detected. Choose which one to add.
